_comment: Workflow regression for the workplane refactor: build a 1x2x1 cuboid (sizeY=2 → top face has unambiguous longest edge along Y), rotate 30deg around Z so the cuboid is tilted in the XY plane, alignToSelection on the rotated +Z face, then prim.cube creates a unit cube which should land workplane-aligned (its 'up' along the picked face normal, its 'Z' along the longest edge of that face). Verifies vibe3d's BoxTool.applyHeadless + currentWorkplaneFrame + the longest-edge-along-Z alignToSelection rule against MODO bit-for-bit.
